notes.body: The Power of One — One Brand, One Team, One Family. The Operations Manual is the single source of truth. Develop two future GMs/year; keep a minimum of six Shift Leaders. Shopper scores: 100% is attainable — Halo Effect, Suggestive Selling, grill culture. June budget at bottom of 2065 sheet (DoorDash + UberEats baked in). Large soda now 30 cents more than Regular.

KPI Ranking: 60% of score = Secret Shop scores + Customer complaints (CSPs) + Ticket times. Coach early to prevent complaints, spot-check register (fry/drink/shake every time), use huddles to coach, greet every guest, correct grill culture (2 for guys / 1 for girls). File hub tickets for any outside vendor work. GM/AGM call canceled this week. Welcome Hannah Kaufman (HR/Payroll).
KY-2065 open tasks: Labor Not Posted (6/28), Inv-Final for Post (6/28), L-Rev (6/27). Post labor + finalize inventory to close the period clean.
PFG delivery Tue 6/30 — 91 cases, confirmed with exceptions: Tomato Red Large (21606) market-directed sub JN744; K7468 HACCP cannot be returned. Receiving manager: verify the tomato sub on the truck.
